micro_rules: Return exactly one JSON object only with keys name, cron, period, code.

rows.command_eng: Every 10 minutes, if the temperature is 30 degrees or higher, set the air conditioner to cool mode.
Every 30 minutes, if the temperature is 20 degrees or higher and below 30 degrees, set the air conditioner to auto mode; if it is 30 degrees or higher, set it to cool mode.
Lock the doorlock every day at midnight.
rows.output: {"name":"Lock the doorlock every day at midnight.","cron":"0 0 * * *","period":0,"code":"(#DoorLock).doorlock_lock()"}

rows.command_eng: On weekends at 3 PM, check for leakage; if detected, set the siren to emergency mode.

rows.command_kor: 10분마다 확인해서 온도가 30도 이상이면 에어컨을 쿨모드로 설정해줘.
